name: Otto von Schirach
description:
'''Otto von Schirach''' (born March 10, 1978, in [[Miami]], Florida) is an American [[Intelligent dance music|IDM]] and [[breakcore]] musician. Of Cuban and German heritage, he grew up in the [[Little Havana]] neighborhood of Miami and heavily incorporates elements of [[Miami bass]] into his music. He started out DJing at house parties in the 1990s and began composing his own music. In 2001 he released his first album, ''8000 B.C.'', on his own Triangle Earth label.

Von Schirach has a son who was born in 2016.
